law: Vancouver Street and Traffic Bylaw #2849 (camping/tent provisions)
purposes: To regulate use of streets and public property for traffic safety
To regulate use of streets and public property for public order

provisions.text: A person must not place, erect, or maintain a temporary shelter on any street. (from training data)
A person must not obstruct a street. (from training data)
A person must not place or keep on any street any matter or thing so as to obstruct the street or create a nuisance. (from training data)

derivation:
MTM-Literal derivation
  m = |purposes| = 2
  n = |provisions| = 3
  purposes served by ≥1 provision = 2/2
  → F (Faithfulness) = 2/2 = 1.0000
  provisions serving no purpose = 0/3
  → X (Excess)       = 0/3 = 0.0000
  α = 0.5, β = 0.5
  MTM-L = 100 · [α · (1 − F) + β · X]
        = 100 · [0.5 · (1 − 1.0000) + 0.5 · 0.0000]
        = 100 · [0.0000 + 0.0000]
        = 0.00
